All computer systems from LLT(HPC) Computers are custom configured

4. Acceptance 
All computer systems sold shall be deemed accepted by Customer unless (a) 
within 10 calendar days from invoice date, the Customer notifies LLT(HPC) 
Computers in writing that the system(s) are defective; OR (b) the Federal 
Government has specified a specific Acceptance Testing Criteria and period. 
During this period, advanced replacement part(s) will be rushed to Customer 
to replace the defective part(s). 
5. Shipping Damage 
Customers are responsible to refuse all packages that arrive damaged. 
Customers need to notify LLT(HPC) Computers within 24 hours from the 
delivery date if a computer system was delivered damaged and will need to 
provide pictures of the damaged packaging in order to obtain a RMA number. 
Customers take full responsibility for accepting any packages damaged during 
shipping. 
6. Technical Support 
During the Limited Warranty period, LLT(HPC) Computers will provide product 
technical support. The scope of technical support consists of helping you 
diagnose and resolve problems with defects in computer systems integrated 
by us. LLT(HPC) Computers will ONLY be able to provide technical support 
on OS installation to the original end user if the OS was purchased as part of 
the computer system from us. LLT(HPC) Computers is not the manufacturer 
of the software or operating system and does not guarantee that software or 
operating system will be free from errors, either in isolation or in combination 
with hardware.
